title: Projects
subtitle: Boundary containers for data and access

empty.title: No projects yet
empty.description: Create your first project to organize files, data assets and datasets.

delete.title: Delete project?
delete.description: This soft-deletes "{{name}}". The action is recorded in the audit log.

archive.title: Archive project?
archive.description: "{{name}}" will be hidden from the active list. You can unarchive anytime.

unarchive.title: Unarchive?
unarchive.description: "{{name}}" will reappear in the active list.

members.title: Members
members.removeDescription: This removes the member from the project.

grants.title: Fine-grained access
grants.subtitle: Roles grant project-wide CRUD. Here you can override roles per content type — give a specific member create/read/update/delete on a single drug-asset type or data template (e.g. a viewer who may add to "Antibody" but not delete).
grants.emptyHint: Create drug-asset types or data templates first; then you can grant per-member access here.

visibility.label: Visibility
visibility.privateDesc: Only invited members can see and enter; others in the org can't see it.
visibility.orgDesc: Everyone in the organization can see and read it; editing still requires being invited as a member. Other organizations in the company can't see it.

shares.title: Cross-org sharing
shares.desc: Share this project with an organization (its members get the granted role); no org = share with all orgs (group-wide).
shares.scopeHint: Pick an organization = share the project with it; its members access by the granted role. Pick "All organizations" = group-wide, every org in this company can access. Handy for cross-subsidiary collaboration.

notFound: Project not found or not accessible
